sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 10:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 10:1
items.html: There is no movement, meaning innovation, in the upper light. Instead, the part that the emanated being receives from the upper light (like lighting a candle from another without the first lessening) is what becomes “innovated” and multiplies according to the new forms in the vessels, where each one receives according to the measure of the desire in it, whose states change from one another and cascade from one another immeasurably and endlessly. (Inner Light, Part 1, Chap 2, item 1)
